  • Wukong Code on GitHub

Getting Started

Requirements

  • macOS, Linux, or Windows
  • A local workspace directory
  • An API key for your LLM provider

Wukong Code supports multiple providers — managed auth is optional. Bring your own keys.

Install & Verify

curl -fsSL https://wukong.today/install.sh | sh

Install on macOS or Linux:

curl -fsSL https://wukong.today/install.sh | sh

For Windows, download the .exe from the releases page.

wukong --version

Verify the installation:

wukong --version

Core Workflow

wukong provider

Configure an LLM provider:

wukong provider

wukong

Launch the interactive TUI:

wukong

wukong -p <prompt>

Run a one-off prompt:

wukong -p "summarize this repository"

Verification

wukong verify

Run checks and write an evidence report:

wukong verify

wukong scan

Scan git changes for delivery risks:

wukong scan

wukong guard

Inspect risky commands before execution:

wukong guard --status

Next Steps

  • Browse the command reference
  • Learn about configuration options
